nasb.text: and hope does not disappoint, because the love of God has been poured out within our hearts through the Holy Spirit who was given to us.

esv.text: and hope does not put us to shame, because God’s love has been poured into our hearts through the Holy Spirit who has been given to us.

cnv.text: 盼望是不會令人蒙羞的，因為　神藉著所賜給我們的聖靈，把他的愛澆灌在我們的心裡。

ccb.text: 这种盼望不会落空，因为上帝的爱借着所赐给我们的圣灵已倾注在我们心中。

csbs.text: 而这盼望不使人羞愧，因为神的爱藉着所赐给我们的圣灵，已经倾注在我们的心里。
